creator: ports@skyforge.at
text: Found some time to work on this issue and got a useful pointer from other packagers: The issue with the teststuite is not a py-matrix-synapse problem but rather bug #258610. Updating the py-elementpath dependency fixes py-xmlschema and makes the synapse teststuite pass, so I think we can merge this and wait for #258610, as the problem will exist in either synapse version.
